     the Fermi energy is    -1.1633 ev

!    total energy              =  -14482.56312753 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000016 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.19957561 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14482.36355192 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -316572.67836153 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  159700.65999360 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6011.63422567 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  148404.06977929 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -2.78073760 Ry

     total magnetization       =    92.11 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =   107.77 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  22 iterations
